items.title: As a passenger, I can accrue loyalty points

items.description: User should be able to exchange accumulated points for ride credits
items.title: As a passenger, I can redeem loyalty points

items.description: User should see loyalty points balance and how to redeem
items.title: As a user, I can view my loyalty balance

items.description: User should be able to see list of rides booked for future dates
items.title: As a passenger, I can view scheduled rides

items.description: User should be able to change time or destination of scheduled rides
items.title: As a passenger, I can modify a scheduled ride

items.description: User should be able to cancel future bookings with appropriate refunds
items.title: As a passenger, I can cancel a scheduled ride

items.description: Driver should be able to track maintenance schedules for their vehicle
items.title: As a driver, I can set vehicle maintenance reminders

items.description: Driver should see current fuel or electric battery status in the app
items.title: As a driver, I can track vehicle fuel/battery levels

items.description: Driver should get alerts when maintenance is due
items.title: As a driver, I can receive maintenance alerts

items.description: User should be able to report driver safety concerns to platform
items.title: As a passenger, I can report unsafe driving

items.description: User should be able to verify driver has updated documents
items.title: As a passenger, I can request driver documents verification

items.description: Driver should be able to see passenger rating before accepting
items.title: As a driver, I can view passenger safety rating

items.description: Driver should be able to report passenger misconduct
items.title: As a driver, I can report problematic passengers

items.description: Admin should see dashboard of suspicious transactions and behaviors
items.title: As an admin, I can view fraud alerts

items.description: Admin should be able to suspend accounts suspected of fraud
items.title: As an admin, I can disable flagged accounts

items.description: User should be able to opt-in to pool rides with other passengers
items.title: As a passenger, I can enable ride sharing feature

items.description: User should see how much they save by choosing a pooled ride
items.title: As a passenger, I can see estimated savings from pooling

items.description: User should be able to communicate with other passengers in shared ride
items.title: As a passenger, I can message other pool passengers

items.description: Driver should be able to accept and manage multiple passengers in pool ride
items.title: As a driver, I can accept multiple passengers at once

items.description: User should be able to rate all aspects of shared ride experience
items.title: As a passenger, I can rate the overall pool ride experience

items.description: User should have access to comprehensive privacy and data policy
items.title: As a user, I can view privacy policy

items.description: User should be able to download all their personal data
items.title: As a user, I can export my data

items.description: User should be able to permanently delete their account and data
items.title: As a user, I can delete my account

items.description: User should control when and how location data is collected
items.title: As a user, I can manage location permissions

items.description: User should approve before their data is shared with partners
items.title: As a user, I can control data sharing with third parties

items.description: User should be able to add 2FA for enhanced account security
items.title: As a user, I can enable two-factor authentication

items.description: User should be able to authenticate with fingerprint or face recognition
items.title: As a user, I can use biometric login

items.description: User should get notifications about login attempts and account changes
items.title: As a user, I can receive security alerts

items.description: User should be able to save home as default start location
items.title: As a passenger, I can set my home address in profile

items.description: User should be able to save work as frequent destination
items.title: As a passenger, I can set my work address in profile

items.description: User should be able to request female driver or other preferences
items.title: As a passenger, I can request specific driver attributes

items.description: Driver should be able to configure preferences for ride requests
items.title: As a driver, I can set preferences for passenger types

items.description: Driver should be able to reject rides to certain areas
items.title: As a driver, I can set destination preferences

items.description: User should be able to select app language and switch anytime
items.title: As a user, I can change language preferences

items.description: User should see complete history of all past rides
items.title: As a user, I can view my ride history

items.description: User should be able to find specific past rides by date or location
items.title: As a user, I can search my ride history

items.description: User should filter history by ride type (economy, comfort, premium)
items.title: As a user, I can filter rides by type

items.description: User should be able to export history in CSV or PDF format
items.title: As a user, I can export ride history

items.description: Driver should see complete history of all earnings and payouts
items.title: As a driver, I can view my earnings history

items.description: Driver should be able to see earnings for specific time periods
items.title: As a driver, I can filter earnings by date range

items.description: Driver should see tax deductible amounts for each completed ride

items.description: User should see aggregated stats like total distance, time, costs
items.title: As a user, I can view trip statistics

items.description: User should see environmental impact and CO2 emissions for rides
items.title: As a user, I can view carbon impact of my rides

items.description: User should see aggregated environmental metrics for all rides
items.title: As a user, I can view environmental impact dashboard

project_metadata.description: Modern ride-sharing application with real-time GPS tracking, intelligent driver matching, surge pricing, and comprehensive safety features. Full-stack solution covering iOS, Android, and web platforms.
